programme.title: Reel Rock
programme.desc: Alex Honnold and Tommy Caldwell introduce us to one of the most coveted prizes in the climbing world: the speed record on The Nose route up the 915m El Capitan in Yosemite, California.
programme.series-desc: Alex Honnold and Tommy Caldwell introduce us to the speed record on The Nose route up El Capitan, California.

programme.title: Wings for Life World Run: Inside the Biggest Race
programme.sub-title: Behind the scences of the massive global run
programme.desc: Take a fascinating journey into one of the world's most amazing running events. Over 250,000 people start simultaneously across the globe, united by a common goal: to make spinal cord injury curable.
programme.series-desc: Wings for Life World Run is a global sports and charity phenomenon, and it unites people worldwide.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From BASE jumping a cave to a flying mega swing
programme.desc: Wingsuit flying through London’s Tower Bridge at 246kph. Swinging from a hot air balloon. Slacklining the length of two football fields. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from slacklining the distance of two soccer fields to BASE jumping into a cave.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From freerunning Greek isles to skiing the Streif
programme.desc: A gnarly shipping container BMX set-up. Freerunning in Santorini. Taking on the Streif at night. Enduro riding on a volcano. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from skiing down the steepest run at night to slacklining during an eclipse.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From soapbox madness to skydiving with an FMX bike
programme.desc: Snowboarding – or, rather sandboarding – in the desert. Rally cars on frozen lakes. The wackiness of soapbox racing. Skydiving with a motocross bike. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from skydiving with a motocross bike to riding rally cars on frozen lakes.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.desc: Freethrow master vs robot. High-flying action from wingsuits to parachutes. Wakeboarding in Chile. Barrel racing with a dirtbike. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from barrel racing with a dirtbike to the first quad cork ever landed.

programme.title: Ice Waterfalls
programme.sub-title: Kayaking off the world's highest ice waterfall
programme.desc: Catalan adventurer and elite kayaker Aniol Serrasolses shatters boundaries on his Arctic expedition to Norway when he descends a 20m-high ice waterfall - the largest ever recorded kayak drop from a glacial waterfall.
programme.series-desc: Kayaker Aniol Serrasolses ventures deep into the wild Arctic. His mission? To conquer an extreme ice waterfall and record the world's highest drop from a glacial river.

programme.title: WSL Championship Tour 2025
programme.sub-title: WSL Lexus Pipe Pro wrap show
programme.desc: After five days of competition Barron Mamiya and Tyler Wright leave Hawaii as the 2025 Lexus Pipe Pro champions. Here's a recap of the highs, the lows, and everything else you need to know.
programme.series-desc: Barron Mamiya and Tyler Wright won the Lexus Pipe Pro. The WSL broadcast crew break down how it went down.

programme.title: WSL Championship Tour 2025
programme.sub-title: WSL Abu Dhabi Pro wrap show
programme.desc: After three days of insane action, the WSL’s first Middle Eastern event was a wild success. The commentary team break down all the storylines as Caitlin Simmers and Italo Ferreira take the crowns.
programme.series-desc: The WSL commentary crew review all of the action after Caitlin Simmers's and Italo Ferreira's victories.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: In the Peruvian Amazon, a man in his 70s faces leaving the monkeys he's dedicated his life to protecting.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on the Stream: Why does Sweden have such a high rate of gun crime?
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on the Stream: Why does Sweden have such a high rate of gun crime?
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A fisherman from Senegal runs for elections in Spain to combat Europe's exploitative overfishing of Africa's waters.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We discuss the dangers of falling in love online and how technology is used to deceive, manipulate, and steal from victims.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.
